title: QuoteResponse
description: A premium quote for a Nexus Mutual cover purchase, including premium in NXM and cover asset, and pool allocation data.

quote.description: The quote details for the requested cover

totalCoverAmountInAsset.description: The total cover amount in the cover asset's smallest unit (e.g. wei for ETH)

annualPrice.description: The annual price as a basis-point percentage (0-10,000). Divide by 10,000 to get a decimal rate.

premiumInNXM.description: The premium value denominated in NXM (smallest unit). Use when paying with NXM.

premiumInAsset.description: The premium value denominated in the cover asset's smallest unit. Use when paying with the cover asset.

poolAllocationRequests.description: Selected staking pools with allocated capacity for this cover. Required for the on-chain buy-cover transaction.

coverAmountInAsset.description: The cover amount allocated from this pool (smallest unit of cover asset)

skip.description: If true, skip this pool allocation in the transaction

id.description: The id of the cover asset

symbol.description: The symbol of the cover asset (e.g. ETH, DAI)

decimals.description: The number of decimal places for the cover asset
